generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent debates about expanding security powers make me think: why are we hesitating? Just last year, our local community faced a serious threat that could have been prevented with better intelligence sharing. The current system is too fragmented. We need streamlined powers to keep our families safe. It's not about giving up liberties - it's about smart, responsible security that actually works. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
